getStarted: Let's get started with your finances
overview: Here's an overview of your finances for {{period}}

noAccount.title: No Account Selected
noAccount.description: You need to create or select an account first

reportsCta.title: 📊 Want to see your finances in detail?
reportsCta.description: Analyze your finances with interactive charts, monthly comparisons and personalized reports

emptyState.title: Getting Started
emptyState.welcome: 👋 Welcome to Avaltra! Here's what you can do next:

tips.trackTransactions: Start tracking your expenses and incomes
tips.setSavings: Set up savings goals to reach your financial targets
tips.inviteFamily: Invite family members to shared accounts

tooltips.availableBalance: This is how much money you have left after subtracting your expenses from your income. This is what you can actually spend.
tooltips.expenses: All the expenses you've recorded this month. Includes purchases, services, and any money you've spent.
tooltips.income: The income you've recorded this month. This could be your salary, side work, or any money you've received.
tooltips.expensesByCategory: Here you can see which categories you spend the most on. It helps you identify where you can save.
tooltips.recentTransactions: Your most recent activity. The latest expenses and income you've recorded appear here.
tooltips.account: An 'account' is like a virtual wallet where you organize your money. You can have multiple accounts for different purposes (e.g., Personal, Family, Savings).
